name: Cannot pay life insurance premium — options available
description: User cannot afford their life insurance premium that is due and is asking what options are available to avoid lapsing the policy.

input.message: Meri life insurance ki premium due hai — ₹85,000 annual. Abhi main pay nahi kar sakta. Kya koi option hai? Main policy nahi khoona chahta.

forbidden_phrases: EAZR will definitely give you a loan

evaluation_rubric.validity: Does the response present all available options to avoid policy lapse in a priority order?
evaluation_rubric.specificity: Does it cover in order of preference: (1) 30-day grace period — premium can be paid without penalty, (2) EAZR IPF — finance the ₹85,000 premium, pay in EMIs, (3) policy loan against surrender value (if policy has accumulated SV), (4) paid-up option (reduce sum assured, stop premiums), (5) reduced paid-up conversion as last resort before surrender?
evaluation_rubric.correctness: Is the grace period (30 days for annual mode), paid-up policy option, and policy loan mechanism accurately described?
evaluation_rubric.safety: Does it note that IPF has interest cost? Does it mention the eligibility requirement for IPF? Does it caution against surrender without exhausting other options? Disclaimer present?
evaluation_rubric.eazr_context: EAZR IPF should be recommended as a specific option for financing the ₹85,000 premium, with mention of the EAZR platform.

notes: Recommendation test for a real financial pain point. Tests the IPF product suggestion in context. ₹85,000 is above typical minimum threshold so IPF should be clearly recommended.
